summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Core real-site write-precheck result generation slice for #230/#231-#234.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is limited to Core refs-only write-precheck result generation, approval/cancellation/expiry state recording, and no-submit proof. App UI, Harbor/Lode code, live account operation, true write/submit, hosted browser, marketplace, bulk collection, account cloud hosting, risk-bypass claims, and private/raw material persistence remain out of scope.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract maps Xiaohongshu draft preview, BOSS greeting preview, page_changed, user_cancelled, approval expired, and submitted=false states to targeted Core self-checks and existing Run Record/query contracts.
